results.title: From war machines to tractor tech - military veterans bring skills into farm sector
results.description: Norwich-based farm machinery dealer Ben Burgess is helping armed forces veterans to bring military skills into the agricultural industry through the Armed Forces Covenant.

results.title: Designed for 10 PSI gas, running on 1.5: How Bangladesh’s industries are being choked
results.description: Manufacturers want adequate pressure rather than subsidies

results.title: What I Own: I got a £12,000 bonus to buy my one-bed Brentford flat
results.description: This weekend, we're in South London chatting to 27-year-old Harry Horrigan, who bought his one-bedroom flat for £390,000 last year.
